strengths: ~20 years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, meeting the experience floor
Current direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq demonstrates practical AI builder credentials
Entrepreneurial track record via GISCollective founding and open-source platform development shows product ownership and initiative
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field; education is a BS in CS plus a fine arts degree

Career profile is that of a senior/staff individual contributor, not a director-level technical strategist — no evidence of advising customers, shaping org-wide AI strategy, or influencing at executive level
AI engagement appears recent and narrow (MCP tooling, agentic workflows since April 2025); no demonstrated track record of building or shipping AI-powered products at recognized scale
response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine technical breadth and longevity, and his current AI-agent infrastructure work shows he is actively building in the space. However, the role is a director-level IC position requiring recognized AI thought leadership, customer advisory experience, and the ability to shape cloud and AI strategy at organizational scale — a profile that does not emerge from the resume. His career arc is that of a craftsman and builder rather than a technical strategist or executive influencer, and his AI depth is both recent and narrowly scoped. Without evidence of strategic impact, external AI recognition, or cloud platform expertise at enterprise scale, he falls materially short of the seniority and scope this role demands.
